prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is I-101 Transmitter installation within 2.8 Instrumentation & Controls. The relevant subcategory is 2.8.1 Field Instruments. The observed field condition is: DP impulse lines sloped wrong for service (gas taps below pipe / liquid taps on top - the classic). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors API RP 551, mfr manuals.
title: T1 I-101 Code/spec compliance
